title: move formats pkg to and vendor from buildah
body:
move formats package to buildah/cmd/formats so buildah can use formats to solve images output format [#1239](https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1239)
PR in buildah uses formats pkg [#1398](https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1398)
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *QiWang19* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

This PR has been merged to early as we're now vendoring a private branch for buildah instead of the official project. We should hurry and get https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1398 merged to get back to using github.com/containers/buildah.

Please mark such PRs as `WIP` to avoid accidentally merging them. I am currently blocked by it as I wanted to vendor it some new changed from buildah.
